name: Rizky Pratama Yudha
title: Backend Developer
description: Simplifying Frontend & Backend Development for Your Projects
bio:
Hello! I am a student at Politeknik Negeri Malang focused on Backend Development with experience in building scalable, secure, and high-performance server-side applications. I am proficient in technologies such as Laravel, MySQL, Javascript, PHP Native, and APIs used in Flutter Mobile applications.

My passion is optimizing application performance with efficient solutions. I also have experience with frontend technologies like HTML 5, CSS, Bootstrap 5, Tailwind CSS, and AdminLTE templating.

I believe that teamwork and collaboration are key to creating the best solutions for clients and end users.
education: Politeknik Negeri Malang - Jurusan Teknologi Informasi

education_timeline.description: Fokus pada pengembangan rekayasa perangkat lunak, optimasi database relasional, analisis algoritma, dan pemrograman sistem backend terdistribusi.
